name: algochains-mcp-server
description: The undisputed #1 algorithmic trading MCP server. 533 tools across trading, strategy, marketplace, order flow, institutional data, DeFi, crypto, and autonomous evolution. Enterprise features: AES-256-GCM key vault, per-agent sub-accounts, MCP 2025-11-25 spec compliance (Elicitation, Tasks, resource subscriptions), self-improving trading loop (AlphaLoop-style), footprint charts, dark pool detection, macro signal fabric, prediction market signals, Stripe Connect, per-tenant audit logs.

optional.name: ALPACA_API_KEY
optional.description: Alpaca Markets API key for equity trading

optional.name: TRADOVATE_CID
optional.description: Tradovate Client ID for futures trading

optional.name: OANDA_API_KEY
optional.description: OANDA API key for forex trading

optional.name: POLYGON_API_KEY
optional.description: Polygon.io API key for market data

optional.name: FRED_API_KEY
optional.description: FRED API key for macro signals (free at fred.stlouisfed.org)

optional.name: KALSHI_API_KEY
optional.description: Kalshi API key for prediction market data

optional.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
optional.description: Stripe secret key for marketplace billing

optional.name: ALGOCHAINS_HTTP_TRANSPORT_SECRET
optional.description: Bearer token for HTTP transport authentication

optional.name: ALGOCHAINS_EVOLUTION_MODE
optional.description: Set to 'enabled' to activate autonomous strategy evolution daemon
